title: Spacecoin
summary: Spacecoin is a decentralized satellite internet project built around a DePIN network, Low Earth Orbit satellites, and censorship-resistant connectivity. Arcium includes it in ecosystem coverage rather than a publicly documented Arcium integration.
description:
Spacecoin positions itself as decentralized satellite internet infrastructure powered by a blockchain-based DePIN network. The public site emphasizes censorship-resistant connectivity, LEO satellites, and global access for populations that remain underserved or disconnected.

Arcium includes Spacecoin in its encrypted DePIN ecosystem. That supports inclusion in Atlas, but I did not find a current Spacecoin page documenting a specific Arcium-powered module.

bodySections.title: Network_Surface
bodySections.body: Spacecoin is not a typical crypto app; it is physical and communications infrastructure. That matters for Atlas because encrypted computation is often discussed as software, but privacy-preserving edge networks and communications layers create a broader and more ambitious context.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Spacecoin among DePIN ecosystem partners. That is enough for Atlas inclusion, but not enough to classify the relationship as a confirmed integration without a project-side implementation page.

statusNote: Arcium includes Spacecoin in its encrypted DePIN ecosystem coverage, but the public Spacecoin materials I reviewed do not document an explicit Arcium-powered module.

sources.label: Spacecoin Website
sources.note: Official site describing the decentralized satellite internet and DePIN stack.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
sources.note: Arcium lists Spacecoin among DePIN ecosystem partners.
